description: Provides access to Best Buy's e-commerce catalog, enabling product search, detailed product information retrieval, customer reviews, category browsing, and store location services.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products in the Best Buy catalog using keywords with optional filtering by category, price range, and stock availability. Returns paginated results with essential product information.

keywords.description: Search terms used to find matching products in the catalog (e.g., 'laptop', 'bluetooth headphones')

category.description: The category path name or ID to constrain search results to a specific product category

min_price.description: Minimum price threshold filter to exclude products below this price point

max_price.description: Maximum price threshold filter to exclude products above this price point

in_stock_only.description: Filter flag to return only products available for purchase (in-store or online)

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return per request (valid range: 1-100)

from.description: The starting index of the current result set within the total matching products

to.description: The ending index of the current result set within the total matching products

total.description: The total number of products matching the search criteria across all pages

currentPage.description: The current page number in the paginated search results

totalPages.description: The total number of pages available for the search query based on result count and limit

products.description: Collection of product summaries matching the search criteria

sku.description: The Best Buy product Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) - a unique identifier for the product

name.description: The product name or title as displayed in the catalog

salePrice.description: The current selling price of the product, reflecting any active discounts

regularPrice.description: The standard retail price before any promotional discounts are applied

onSale.description: Indicates whether the product is currently on sale (salePrice < regularPrice)

inStoreAvailability.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase in physical Best Buy store locations

onlineAvailability.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase through Best Buy's website

thumbnailImage.description: URL to the product's thumbnail image for visual identification

url.description: Direct URL to the product detail page on Best Buy's website

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive detailed information for a specific product using its SKU, including descriptions, pricing, reviews summary, specifications, and image assets.

sku.description: The Best Buy product Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) - a unique identifier for the product
The Best Buy product Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) - a unique identifier for the product

name.description: The product name or title as displayed in the catalog

description.description: Brief summary description of the product suitable for search results and previews

longDescription.description: Detailed marketing description of the product features and benefits

salePrice.description: The current selling price of the product, reflecting any active discounts

regularPrice.description: The standard retail price before any promotional discounts are applied

onSale.description: Indicates whether the product is currently on sale (salePrice < regularPrice)

customerReviewAverage.description: The average customer rating score, typically on a scale of 1-5 stars

customerReviewCount.description: The total number of customer reviews submitted for this product

images.description: Collection of product image URLs at various resolutions

thumbnailImage.description: URL to the small thumbnail version of the product image

mediumImage.description: URL to the medium-resolution product image suitable for category browsing

largeImage.description: URL to the high-resolution product image suitable for detail pages

manufacturer.description: The brand or manufacturer name of the product (e.g., 'Apple', 'Samsung')

modelNumber.description: The manufacturer's specific model number or identifier for this product

categoryPath.description: Hierarchical navigation path showing the product's placement in the category tree

id.description: Unique identifier for the category node

name.description: Display name of the category in the breadcrumb hierarchy

features.description: List of key product features and specifications

feature.description: Text description of a specific product feature or specification

tools.name: get_product_reviews
tools.description: Retrieve customer reviews and ratings for a specific product identified by SKU, including review text, ratings, and helpfulness metrics.

sku.description: The Best Buy product Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) - a unique identifier for the product

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return per request

sku.description: The Best Buy product Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) - a unique identifier for the product

overallRating.description: The aggregate average rating across all customer reviews (scale typically 1-5)

totalReviewCount.description: The total number of customer reviews available for this product

id.description: Unique identifier for the specific review

rating.description: The star rating given by the reviewer (typically 1-5 scale)

reviewer.description: Information about the customer who submitted the review

displayName.description: The public display name or alias of the reviewer

submissionTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the review was submitted

title.description: The review headline or title summarizing the customer's opinion

reviewText.description: The full text content of the customer review

helpfulness.description: Count of other users who found this review helpful

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: Retrieve the complete hierarchical category tree for Best Buy's product catalog, including category IDs, names, and nested subcategory relationships.

categories.description: Complete list of product categories available in the Best Buy catalog

path.description: Breadcrumb trail showing this category's position in the hierarchy from root to current

id.description: Unique identifier for the category node in the path

name.description: Display name of the category in the breadcrumb

subCategories.description: Nested child categories contained within this category

tools.name: get_stores
tools.description: Find Best Buy retail store locations using geographic filters such as city, state, ZIP code, or latitude/longitude coordinates with a search radius.

city.description: City name to filter store locations (e.g., 'Los Angeles')

state.description: Two-letter state abbreviation to filter stores (e.g., 'CA', 'NY')

zip_code.description: Postal ZIP code to find stores in a specific postal area

lat.description: Latitude coordinate for geographic center point when performing radius-based searches

lng.description: Longitude coordinate for geographic center point when performing radius-based searches

radius.description: Search radius in miles from the specified coordinates (default: 25 miles)

stores.description: Collection of Best Buy retail locations matching the search criteria

storeId.description: Unique numeric identifier for the store location

storeType.description: Classification of store format (e.g., 'Big Box', 'Mobile Specialty Store')

name.description: Official name of the store location

city.description: City where the store is located

state.description: State abbreviation where the store is located

zip.description: Postal ZIP code of the store location

phone.description: Contact phone number for the store

hours.description: Operating hours description or schedule for the store

services.description: List of services offered at this location (e.g., 'Geek Squad', 'Apple Authorized Service')

lat.description: Latitude coordinate of the store location

lng.description: Longitude coordinate of the store location
